creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
I converted many ports to USES=luajit, but I left ports that I was unable to test or ascertain that could support the luajit-devel API.

Ideally, no port should be using the old version in lang/luajit. It's the last stable release, but only because upstream no longer believes in releases. Any port that can build and run against luajit-devel should be using it.
